prompt: Describe a beautiful room in two or three sentences.
model: REPLACE ME — model name and version
settings: Ten runs, each in a fresh chat, default settings, no system prompt.
note: The outputs below are illustrative drafts. Replace them with your own real runs before class (see README, 'Regenerate the data honestly').

outputs.text: A beautiful room is filled with natural light streaming through large windows, with soft neutral tones creating a sense of calm. A few well-chosen plants add life, and a comfortable reading chair invites you to linger.

Picture a sunlit space with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a garden. Warm wooden floors, a plush cream sofa with textured throw pillows, and trailing greenery on open shelves make the room feel both elegant and inviting.
A beautiful room balances light, texture, and calm. Imagine white walls washed in morning sun, a linen sofa, a leafy fiddle-leaf fig in the corner, and a shelf of well-loved books.

The most beautiful rooms feel serene and uncluttered. Natural light pours through big windows onto pale oak floors, and a neutral palette of whites and warm grays lets a single piece of art stand out.
A crackling fireplace anchors the space, flanked by built-in bookshelves. Sunlight filters through tall windows, and soft throws over a deep sofa make the whole room feel like an invitation to stay.
Think soft, layered neutrals — ivory, sand, warm taupe — with abundant daylight and a view of trees beyond the glass. A sculptural plant and a handwoven rug add just enough character.
A beautiful room welcomes you with warmth: honey-toned wood, generous windows, green plants on the sill, and a reading nook bathed in afternoon light.
Clean lines and a calm, minimal palette define the space. Morning light falls across a low platform bed, a single monstera thrives by the window, and nothing feels out of place.
It's a room that breathes: high ceilings, white walls, sunlight everywhere. A worn leather armchair by the fireplace, shelves of books, and a soft wool blanket give it soul.
A beautiful room combines comfort and simplicity — natural light through large windows, plants that soften the corners, warm wood accents, and a neutral base of creams and grays.
